title: All 16 workflows — master patient journey
caption: Complete flow from first paid touch to long-term retention. The PCC Sales Form submit is the entry to the visit gate: WF-05 first branches on appt_status (showed to outcome routing, no-show or cancel to WF-08, reschedule back to WF-03). WF-05 (purple) is the keystone: it's the only place appointment outcomes land on the Opportunity, routing on the sale_outcome codes SOLD, AD, MUT, MAR. MAR opens a PCC and provider task and re-enters on approval. Every sold deal flows right; every failure flows to the retention pool. Dotted = signal/support workflows.
src:
flowchart TD
    PAID([Paid and Organic Traffic]) --> WF01
    MISS([Missed Call or Chat]) --> WF16
    WF16[16 - Comms Edge] --> WF01
    WF01[01 - Lead Capture and Attribution] -->|Books| WF03
    WF01 -->|No book after 24h| WF02
    WF02[02 - Non-Booked Recovery]
    WF03[03 - Booking Confirmation and Reminders] --> WF04
    WF04[04 - Medical Intake Chase]
    WF03 -->|Cancelled - halt reminders| WF08
    WF03 -->|Appointment day - form submitted| VISIT{Visit - appt_status}
    VISIT -->|no-show or cancel| WF08
    VISIT -->|reschedule| WF03
    VISIT -->|showed| WF05
    WF08[08 - No-Show and Cancel Recovery]
    WF08 -->|Re-booked| WF03
    WF05[05 - Clinic Outcome Router] -->|sold| WF06
    WF05 -->|ad| WF07
    WF05 -->|mut| WF11
    WF05 -->|mar| WFMAR
    WFMAR[MAR - Medical Approval Required
PCC and provider task - Opp stays Open]
    WFMAR -.->|approval - form resubmitted| WF05
    WF06[06 - Post-Visit Won and Onboarding]
    WF07[07 - A&D Nurture]
    WF11[11 - Compliance and Errors]
    WF06 --> WF10[10 - Feedback Survey]
    WF06 --> WF14[14 - Ambassador Program]
    WF14 --> WF15[15 - PCC Referral Routing - tracking only]
    WF15 --> WF01
    WF06 --> WF09[09 - Long-Term Nurture]
    WF07 --> WF09
    WF08 --> WF09
    WF02 -->|16 days no booking| WF09
    WF12[12 - Call Disposition Handler] -.-> WF05
    WF13[13 - Ad Platform Conversions] -.-> ADS[(Google and Meta)]
    subgraph LEGEND [Legend]
      direction LR
      LK[Keystone WF-05: sole outcome writer]
      LW[Won path]
      LS[Signal or support - dotted edges]
    end
    style LK fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style LW fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style LS fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style WF05 fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style WF06 fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style VISIT fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style WFMAR fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style WF09 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style WF02 fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style WF08 fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff

title: WF-01 — Lead Capture and Attribution
caption: Fires on every form submit (5 location webhooks + consultation form). The fix here is capturing gclid and fbclid at the moment of lead creation, before any page navigation clobbers the URL params. Creates the Opportunity in 'New Lead' stage immediately and copies attribution (utm, gclid, fbclid, lead_source) onto the Opportunity at create, so wins AND losses carry attribution. 11 PM rule: the welcome email sends instantly, but the speed-to-lead SMS is queued to 8 AM Contact Timezone when a lead arrives outside quiet hours (TCPA-safe). Inbound webhooks get NO auto-retry, so a reconciliation fallback catches missed Vercel deliveries. All SMS respect quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Form Submitted - Inbound Webhook]) --> A
    A[Capture gclid - fbclid - UTM params
Write to contact custom fields] --> B
    B[Set contact.lead_source
and contact.lead_source_detail] --> C
    C[Create Opportunity - Sales Pipeline New Lead stage
Copy attribution onto Opp at create:
utm - gclid - fbclid - lead_source] --> D
    C --> E
    D[SMS - Speed to Lead
Instant if inside 8a-9p
else queue to 8 AM contact TZ - TCPA-safe] --> F
    E[Email - Welcome
Instant - sends even during quiet hours] --> F
    F[Staff Alert - Internal Notification
plus 2 minutes] --> CALL
    CALL[Phone Call - Speed to Lead
plus 5 minutes] --> G
    G{Appointment booked
within 24 hours?}
    G -->|Yes| OK
    G -->|No| NG
    OK([Exit to WF-03 Booking Confirmation and Reminders])
    NG([Exit to WF-02 Non-Booked Recovery])
    FALL([Fallback: reconcile form submissions
vs opportunities every 15 min]) -.-> RECON
    RECON{Submission with
no Opportunity?}
    RECON -->|Yes| C
    RECON -->|No| DONE([In sync])
    style T fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style OK fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style NG fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style C fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style CALL fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style FALL fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff
    style RECON fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff

title: WF-02 — Non-Booked Recovery (10-touch sequence)
caption: Fires when a lead hasn't booked within 24 hours. Runs 5 SMS + 4 email + 1 voicemail over 16 days. Exits immediately if the contact books at any point (goes to WF-03). After 16 days with no booking, hands off to WF-09 long-term nurture. Every SMS and voicemail filters on canonical sms_consent_status + native DND and runs inside quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([No booking 24h after lead
Enters Non-Booked Recovery]) --> CALL
    CALL[Phone Call - Speed to Lead
plus 5 minutes from no-book] --> S1
    S1[SMS 1 - Follow-Up
plus 2 hours] --> E1
    E1[Email 1 - Health Education
plus 4 hours] --> S2
    S2[SMS 2 - Symptom Re-Engagement
plus 1 day] --> E2
    E2[Email 2 - Physician-Led Process
plus 2 days] --> V1
    V1[Voicemail Drop
plus 3 days] --> S3
    S3[SMS 3 - Availability
plus 5 days] --> E3
    E3[Email 3 - Return-to-Self Testimonial
plus 7 days] --> S4
    S4[SMS 4 - Symptom Re-Engagement
plus 10 days] --> E4
    E4[Email 4 - Urgency
plus 14 days] --> S5
    S5[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 16 days] --> EXIT
    EXIT([Exit to WF-09 Long-Term Nurture])
    T -.-> BOOK([Exit at any point if books
to WF-03 Booking Confirmation])
    style T fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style CALL fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style EXIT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style BOOK fill:#166534,color:#fff

title: WF-03 + WF-04 — Pre-Appointment Sequence
caption: From booking confirmation through to appointment day. Booking runs on the new capacity-controlled class calendars that replace the standard service calendars (Decision 12): one calendar per clinic (Richmond, Virginia Beach, Newport News), 60-minute slots on a 60-minute interval, 6 seats per slot (6 consults per hour), 'Show seats per slot' OFF. WF-03 triggers off the per-clinic class calendar IDs, wired at build time. Two owners: WF-03 handles instant confirmation and all appointment reminders (it absorbs the former reminder workflows 03/3a/03b/03c/03d) on the R1 reminder cadence (T-3d / T-1d / morning-of / T-2h), and WF-04 owns the intake form chase. A member who completes intake skips the chase steps. A cancellation halts the reminders and routes to WF-08 No-Show and Cancel Recovery. Appointment-relative waits use an 'if the date already passed' fallback so late bookings don't stall. Every SMS and voicemail filters on sms_consent_status + native DND and runs inside quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart TD
    START([Appointment Booked]) --> C1
    C1[SMS - Booking Confirmation
Instant] --> N1
    START --> E1
    E1[Email - Booking Confirmation
Instant] --> N1
    N1[Staff Notification
Instant] --> I1
    I1[SMS - Intake Form Reminder
plus 1 hour] --> GATE
    GATE{Intake form
completed?}
    GATE -->|Yes| REM
    GATE -->|No| IC1
    IC1[SMS - Intake Chase 1
plus 4 hours] --> IE1
    IE1[Email - Confirmation Chase
plus 12 hours] --> IC2
    IC2[SMS - Urgency Chase 2
plus 24 hours] --> IV1
    IV1[Voicemail Drop
plus 36 hours] --> REM
    REM([Reminders begin - R1 cadence]) --> R1
    REM -.->|Cancelled - halt reminders| CANCEL
    CANCEL([Exit to WF-08 No-Show and Cancel Recovery])
    R1[Email - 3-Day Prep Email
3 days before appointment] --> R2
    R2[SMS - 1-Day Reminder
1 day before appointment] --> R3
    R3[Email - 1-Day Prep Email
1 day before appointment] --> R4
    R4[SMS - Morning-Of
8 AM day of appointment] --> R5
    R5[SMS - 2-Hour Intake Prompt
2 hours before appointment] --> APPT
    APPT([Appointment Day
WF-05 Clinic Outcome Router fires])
    style START fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style APPT fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style CANCEL fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style GATE fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

title: WF-05 — Clinic Outcome Router (THE KEYSTONE)
caption: The most critical workflow in the rebuild. Currently WF-05 auto-creates a Won opportunity for every attendee, producing 939 false wins. After rebuild the PCC Sales Form is the SOLE WRITER of sale_outcome, sale_type, appt_status, and value directly on the Opportunity. WF-05 is a router: it TRIGGERS on the form submission and reacts to the values the form already wrote. It first gates on appt_status (showed to outcome routing, no-show or cancel to WF-08, reschedule to WF-03), then checks outcome_processed_at for idempotency before routing on the sale_outcome codes SOLD, AD, MUT, MAR. Attribution is copied at create by WF-01, not here. CAPI fires once per opportunity; an edit after submit updates fields but does not re-route or re-fire CAPI. No automation writes an outcome. A separate no-form chaser nags the PCC only. This is what fixes revenue recognition.
src:
flowchart TD
    FORM([TRIGGER: PCC Sales Form submitted
Sole writer of sale_outcome + sale_type
+ appt_status + value]) --> Q1
    Q1{appt_status?}
    Q1 -->|no-show or cancel| TOWF08([Exit to WF-08 No-Show and Cancel Recovery])
    Q1 -->|reschedule| TOWF03([Exit to WF-03 Booking Confirmation and Reminders])
    Q1 -->|showed| IDEM
    IDEM{outcome_processed_at
already set?}
    IDEM -->|Yes| SKIP([Already processed
update fields only - no re-route - no CAPI])
    IDEM -->|No| Q2
    Q2{Read sale_outcome
written by the form}
    Q2 -->|sold| SOLD
    SOLD[Move Opp to Won stage
monetary_value = net collected
Require sale_type new or renewal from form
Set renewal_date = Won date + term_1
Stamp outcome_processed_at
Tag: sold + outcome_sold] --> WAIT
    WAIT[Wait 60s so value commits
before ad conversion reads it] --> CAPI
    CAPI[Signal WF-13 Ad Conversions once
Booked + Won to Google and Meta] --> BR
    BR{sale_type}
    BR -->|new| EXIT_SOLD
    BR -->|renewal| EXIT_REN
    EXIT_SOLD([Exit to WF-06 Post-Visit Won and Onboarding])
    EXIT_REN([Exit to WF-09 Renewal Reminders sub-flow])
    Q2 -->|ad| AD
    AD[Move Opp to Lost
ad_reason already on Opp
Stamp outcome_processed_at
Tag: ad + outcome_ad] --> EXIT_AD
    EXIT_AD([Exit to WF-07 A&D Nurture])
    Q2 -->|mut| MUT
    MUT[Move Opp to Lost - MUT
Stamp outcome_processed_at
Tag: mut + outcome_mut
Suppress future automation] --> EXIT_MUT
    EXIT_MUT([Exit to WF-11 Compliance])
    Q2 -->|mar| MAR
    MAR[Opp stays Open
Create PCC and provider task
Tag: mar + outcome_mar
Awaiting provider approval] --> MARRE
    MARRE([Re-entry: form resubmitted with final
outcome once approval lands - back to Q2])
    NOFORM([Parallel: appointment day ends
with NO Sales Form submitted]) --> CHASE
    CHASE[Chaser: notify PCC to complete the form
Writes NO outcome fields
Re-nags until form arrives]
    NOTE[Single-writer: only the form writes outcomes.
Attribution is copied at create by WF-01, not here.
CAPI fires once per opportunity - H5]
    style FORM fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style Q1 fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style Q2 fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style IDEM fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style BR fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style SOLD fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style EXIT_SOLD fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style EXIT_REN fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style AD fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style MUT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style MAR fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style MARRE fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style TOWF08 fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style TOWF03 fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style SKIP fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style CHASE fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style NOFORM fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style NOTE fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style WAIT fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff

title: WF-06 — Post-Visit Won: Onboarding and Review
caption: New-patient path, fires when the Opportunity is moved to Won (renewals route to the WF-09 Renewal Reminders sub-flow instead). Runs onboarding, a progress check-in, and a survey at 14 days. The NPS branch reads opportunity.visit_feedback_score, which the WF-10 Feedback Survey writes on submission. Score >= 8 triggers a Google review request + referral activation; score < 7 fires an internal alert to WF-12 Call Disposition. renewal_date is set by WF-05 at Won (on every Won, new and renewal); WF-06 owns onboarding only and no longer sets it. Every SMS filters on sms_consent_status + native DND and runs inside quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Opportunity Won - Outcome sold - New path
renewal_date already set by WF-05]) --> S1
    S1[SMS - Welcome
plus 1 hour] --> E1
    E1[Email - Welcome and Onboarding
plus 1 hour] --> S2
    S2[SMS - Check-In
plus 3 days] --> E2
    E2[Email - Week 1 Progress
plus 7 days] --> SURVEY
    SURVEY[Trigger WF-10 Feedback Survey
plus 14 days] --> NPS
    NPS{opportunity.visit_feedback_score
written by WF-10}
    NPS -->|8 or above| S4
    S4[SMS - Google Review Request
plus 14 days - conditional] --> S5
    S5[SMS - Referral Activation
plus 21 days] --> EXIT1
    EXIT1([Exit to WF-14 Ambassador Program])
    S5 --> EXIT2([Exit to WF-09 Renewal Reminders sub-flow
Retention Pipeline])
    NPS -->|Below 7| N1
    N1[Internal Alert - Negative NPS
WF-12 Call Disposition notified] --> CALL
    CALL([PCC follows up manually])
    style T fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style EXIT1 fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style EXIT2 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style NPS fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

title: WF-07 A&D Nurture + WF-08 No-Show Recovery
caption: Two parallel recovery paths from a failed visit. A&D Nurture (outcome AD, Advise and Decline) runs an 11-touch objection-handling sequence over 35 days targeting the specific reason the member declined. No-Show and Cancel Recovery runs an 8-touch urgent re-booking sequence over 7 days and early-exits to WF-03 the moment the member re-books, so recovery nags stop. Both exit to WF-09 long-term nurture if no re-engagement. Every SMS and voicemail filters on sms_consent_status + native DND and runs inside quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart LR
    subgraph WF07 ["07 - A&D Nurture (AD) - 35 days"]
        T1([Outcome: AD - Advised and Declined]) --> S11
        S11[SMS 1 - No-Pressure
plus 2 hours] --> E11
        E11[Email - Objection Handling x4
plus 1 day] --> S12
        S12[SMS 2 - Labs on File
plus 3 days] --> E15
        E15[Email - Testimonial
plus 7 days] --> S13
        S13[SMS 3 - Encouragement
plus 14 days] --> E16
        E16[Email - Labs Expiring
plus 21 days] --> S14
        S14[SMS 4 - Final Reminder
plus 30 days] --> S15
        S15[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 35 days] --> OUT1
        OUT1([Exit to WF-09 Long-Term Nurture])
    end
    subgraph WF08 ["08 - No-Show and Cancel Recovery - 7 days"]
        T2([No-Show or Cancel flagged]) --> S21
        T2 -.->|Re-booked at any step - early exit| OK2
        S21[SMS 1 - Recovery
plus 15 minutes] --> E21
        E21[Email - Physician Recovery
plus 1 hour] --> S22
        S22[SMS 2 - Availability
plus 1 day] --> E22
        E22[Email - Benefits Pivot
plus 3 days] --> S23
        S23[SMS 3 - Re-Engagement
plus 3 days] --> S24
        S24[SMS 4 - Scarcity
plus 5 days] --> V21
        V21[Voicemail Drop
plus 7 days] --> S25
        S25[SMS 5 - Empathetic Breakup
plus 7 days] --> GATE2
        GATE2{Re-booked?}
        GATE2 -->|Yes| OK2([Exit to WF-03])
        GATE2 -->|No| NG2([Exit to WF-09])
    end
    style T1 fill:#92400e,color:#fff
    style T2 fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style OUT1 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style NG2 fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style OK2 fill:#166534,color:#fff

title: WF-09 Long-Term Nurture (+ Renewal Reminders sub-flow) — WF-10 Feedback Survey
caption: WF-09 is Long-Term Nurture: a 7-touch educational sequence over 120 days for contacts who declined, no-showed, or lapsed — the slow re-engagement path. It carries an explicitly labeled Renewal Reminders sub-flow for won members approaching opportunity.renewal_date (set by WF-06 at Won). WF-10 is the Feedback Survey: survey submission writes opportunity.visit_feedback_score, which drives the WF-06 NPS branch. All member-facing sends respect quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone.
src:
flowchart TD
    subgraph WF09MAIN [09 - Long-Term Nurture - 120 days]
        NT([Enters Long-Term Nurture
A&D - no-show - lapsed]) --> NE1
        NE1[Email - Energy as Medical Issue
plus 30 days] --> NS1
        NS1[SMS - CTA
plus 45 days] --> NE2
        NE2[Email - Sleep and Performance
plus 60 days] --> NS2
        NS2[SMS - Seasonal Scarcity
plus 75 days] --> NE3
        NE3[Email - Medical Authority
plus 90 days] --> NS3
        NS3[SMS - Return to Self
plus 105 days] --> NE4
        NE4[Email - Re-Engage Breakup
plus 120 days]
    end
    subgraph WF09REN [09 - Renewal Reminders sub-flow - won members]
        RT([Won member approaching
opportunity.renewal_date]) --> RE1
        RE1[Email - 30-Day Notice
30 days before renewal] --> RS1
        RS1[SMS - 21-Day Reminder
21 days before renewal] --> RE2
        RE2[Email - 14-Day Nudge
14 days before renewal] --> RS2
        RS2[SMS - 7-Day Urgency
7 days before renewal] --> RS3
        RS3[SMS - Expiry Day
day of renewal] --> RGATE
        RGATE{Renewed?}
        RGATE -->|Yes| RWIN
        RWIN([Renewed - New Opportunity opened
Retention Pipeline])
        RGATE -->|No| RE3
        RE3[Email - Lapsed Member
plus 3 days] --> RS4
        RS4[SMS - Final
plus 7 days] --> RN1
        RN1[Internal Alert - Churn Risk
plus 7 days] --> ROUT
        ROUT([Exit to WF-09 Long-Term Nurture])
    end
    subgraph WF10 [10 - Feedback Survey]
        FT([Visit complete or milestone reached]) --> FS1
        FS1[SMS Survey and Email Survey
request NPS or CSAT] --> FSUB
        FSUB{Survey submitted?}
        FSUB -->|Yes| FWRITE
        FWRITE[Write opportunity.visit_feedback_score
drives WF-06 NPS branch] --> FDONE
        FSUB -->|No| FDONE([No score - WF-06 NPS branch skipped])
    end
    ROUT --> NT
    style NT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style RT fill:#374151,color:#fff
    style RWIN fill:#166534,color:#fff
    style FWRITE fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style FSUB fill:#0f766e,color:#fff

title: WF-12 — Call Disposition Handler
caption: Handles call outcomes coming off the softphone and disposition workflows. It writes opportunity.call_disposition and reads patient_care_consultant_id (the PCC who owns the contact, written solely by the PCC Sales Form), and routes negative-NPS follow-ups flagged by WF-06 to the right PCC. WF-12 does not write sale outcomes or the PCC id — only the PCC Sales Form writes sale_outcome, sale_type, value, and patient_care_consultant_id (single-writer, see guardrail G9 and Decision 10).
src:
flowchart TD
    T([Call ends on softphone
or disposition workflow fires]) --> D
    D{Call disposition}
    D -->|Connected| C1
    D -->|No answer| C2
    D -->|Voicemail| C3
    D -->|Bad number| C4
    C1[Write opportunity.call_disposition = connected
Read patient_care_consultant_id - form-owned] --> ROUTE
    C2[Write call_disposition = no_answer
Read patient_care_consultant_id - form-owned] --> ROUTE
    C3[Write call_disposition = voicemail
Read patient_care_consultant_id - form-owned] --> ROUTE
    C4[Write call_disposition = bad_number
Flag for data cleanup] --> ROUTE
    ROUTE{Negative-NPS follow-up
flagged by WF-06?}
    ROUTE -->|Yes| NPSR
    ROUTE -->|No| DONE
    NPSR[Assign task to owning PCC
for manual follow-up call] --> DONE
    DONE([Disposition recorded])
    NOTE[WF-12 never writes sale_outcome
sale_type or value - that is the
PCC Sales Form only - H5 single-writer]
    style T fill:#1e40af,color:#fff
    style D fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style ROUTE fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style NPSR fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style NOTE fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style DONE fill:#374151,color:#fff

title: WF-11/13/14/15/16 — Support and Infrastructure Workflows
caption: Six support workflows that run parallel to the main journey. WF-11 Compliance is the single DND and consent authority — every SMS and voicemail workflow filters on canonical sms_consent_status + native DND and runs inside quiet hours 8 AM to 9 PM in the Contact Timezone before any send. WF-13 Ad Conversions fires CAPI events on Booked and Won outcomes only. WF-16 Comms Edge catches missed calls (explicit simultaneous-ring IVR, absorbing the legacy '1. IVR - simultaneous' path) and OOO chat. WF-14 Ambassador and WF-15 PCC Referral Routing are separate: WF-14 activates won members; WF-15 routes referrals into the Referrals pipeline, which is tracking-only (it carries no monetary_value; the Sales opportunity holds all revenue and is excluded from revenue rollups). Referred contacts are always created as NEW contacts (never re-enrolled referrers). funnel_entry_* tags are kept for attribution only. Legend: red = compliance stop, blue = ad signal, green = new lead in.
src:
flowchart TD
    subgraph WF11 [11 - Compliance and Errors - DND and Consent Authority]
        FILT([Every SMS or voicemail send]) --> FCHK
        FCHK{sms_consent_status = opted_in
AND not DND
AND inside 8a-9p contact TZ?}
        FCHK -->|No| HOLD[Hold - do not send]
        FCHK -->|Yes| PASS[Allow send]
        DNC([DNC Contact flagged]) --> STOP1
        STOP1[Set DND flag on Contact
Halt all automation]
        BOUNCE([Email Bounce flagged]) --> STOP2
        STOP2[Remove from email sends
Log to audit trail]
        MUTC([MUT outcome]) --> STOP3
        STOP3[Suppress all future
automation for contact]
    end
    subgraph WF13 [13 - Ad Platform Conversions - CAPI]
        BOOK_EV([Appointment Booked]) --> CAPI1
        CAPI1[Fire Booked Conversion
Google Ads and Meta CAPI]
        WON_EV([Opportunity Won]) --> CAPI2
        CAPI2[Fire Won Conversion
Google Ads and Meta CAPI]
    end
    subgraph WF16 [16 - Comms Edge]
        MISSED([Inbound Call]) --> RING
        RING[Simultaneous-ring IVR
ring all locations at once] --> ANSW
        ANSW{Answered?}
        ANSW -->|Yes| HANDLED([Handled live])
        ANSW -->|No - missed| TXT1
        TXT1[SMS - Instant Text-Back
0 minutes] --> TXT2
        TXT2[SMS - Follow-Up
plus 30 minutes]
        CHAT([Chat OOO]) --> BOT
        BOT[Auto-Response
Schedule link]
    end
    subgraph WF14 [14 - Ambassador Program]
        AMB([Post-sale member activated]) --> REF1
        REF1[Referral activation SMS + welcome email] --> REF2
        REF2[Reward confirmation SMS
when referred lead completes consult]
    end
    subgraph WF15 [15 - PCC Referral Routing - tracking only]
        SUB([PCC submits referral]) --> R15A
        R15A[Create NEW contact
Referrals pipeline - Submitted stage
No monetary_value - tracking only] --> R15B
        R15B[Referred-lead welcome
SMS + email] --> R15C
        R15C[Internal routing alert
assign PCC] --> NEW_LEAD
        NEW_LEAD([New lead created
Routes back to WF-01 - Sales opp carries all revenue])
    end
    REF1 -.->|invite sends referral| SUB
    WF16 -.-> WF01_OUT([WF-01 Lead Capture])
    WF15 -.-> WF01_OUT
    style FCHK fill:#7f1d1d,color:#fff
